checks.message: Calibration must be traceable and evidence-driven.
checks.name: calibrated_parameters

checks.message: The selected NLI model must be used within validated bandwidth.
checks.name: nli_model_applicability

checks.message: Adaptive launch must satisfy the configured working fraction in S, C, and L.
checks.name: per_band_target_usability

checks.message: The optimizer must accept a candidate based on paper-level and robust constraints.
checks.name: optimizer_candidate_accepted

checks.message: Optimizer conclusions require sufficient independent seeds.
checks.name: optimizer_multiseed_stability

checks.message: Intended waveform points must acquire and agree with calibrated predictions on held-out payload data.
checks.name: waveform_validation

checks.message: External evidence must pass source diversity, coverage, provenance, and metric-specific thresholds.
checks.name: independent_external_validation

checks.message: Uncertainty analysis must complete with an acceptable numerical success rate.
checks.name: uncertainty_numerical_success

checks.message: Robust-training and publication holdout batches must be distinct.
checks.name: no_robust_holdout_leakage

checks.message: Independent holdout paired-gain evidence is missing.
checks.name: robust_adaptive_gain

checks.message: Artifacts must belong to and verify against the current run manifest.
checks.name: current_run_artifact_integrity
